rect.style: fill:rgba(0,229,160,0.08); stroke:rgba(0,229,160,0.25); stroke-width:0.5;fill:rgba(0, 229, 160, 0.08);stroke:rgba(0, 229, 160, 0.25);color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:0.5px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
